---
pagetitle: "Structural diagnostics for knowledge integrity"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}

<div class="research-subpage">

<section class="research-subpage-intro">
  <div class="research-kicker">Knowledge systems · Robustness · Topological diagnostics</div>
  <h2 class="research-title">Structural diagnostics for knowledge integrity</h2>
  <div class="research-lede">
    <h3><i>How can we detect when knowledge structures remain coherent, robust, or trustworthy?</i></h3>
  </div>
</section>


<section class="research-subpage-section">
  <h2 class="research-section-title">Overview</h2>
  <p>
    This research theme focuses on developing structural diagnostics for knowledge integrity. I am interested in how knowledge structures remain coherent, become distorted, or degrade as they move through technological and social systems.
  </p>
  <p>
    Through a topological lens, integrity becomes something that can be explored through shape, connectivity, robustness, drift, and the relationships among parts of a knowledge system.
  </p>
</section>



<section class="research-band">
  <div class="research-subpage-section">
    <h2 class="research-section-title">Relevant publications</h2>
    <p class="research-muted">
      This list is intended for publications connected to knowledge integrity, structural diagnostics, epistemic robustness, semantic drift, and trustworthy knowledge systems. Replace each placeholder with a relevant publication for this research theme.
    </p>

    <div class="publication-list">

      <article class="publication-item">
        <a class="publication-snapshot-link" href="REPLACE_WITH_DOI">
					<img class="publication-snapshot" src="../images/publications/IMAGE_FILE" alt="Snapshot image for ...">
				</a>
        <div class="publication-detail">
          <h3>PUBLICATION TITLE</h3>
          <div class="publication-meta">
            <strong>Authors:</strong> <u>Sungyeon Hong</u><br>
            <strong>Year:</strong> 202X<br>
            <strong>Publisher:</strong> PUBLISHER_NAME
          </div>
          <p class="publication-description">
            DESCRIPTION
          </p>
        </div>
      </article>

      
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


</div>

```
